function.name: _table_save_filter_condition
function.description: Set field filter conditions for table view to filter records.

filterViewType.description: Filter condition label display position, recommended to use left by default. Optional values: left (left side), top (top), topBeforeToolbar (above toolbar), right (right side), none (not displayed)

filterConditionList.description: Filter condition configuration list (corresponding to fields in the view filter area).

name.description: Field name, such as employee ID, name.
